title: Assertion fault on a join with a repeated column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id UInt32, name String, age Nullable(UInt32));
CREATE TABLE orders (id UInt32, user_id UInt32, amount Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO users (name, age) VALUES ('Alice', 30), ('Bob', NULL), ('Charlie', 25);
SELECT u.name, o.amount, u.age FROM users AS u JOIN orders AS o ON u.id = o.user_id;
key_bug_features: Join operation with a repeated column
